acceptance.assertion: Receipts include risk and recovery/irreversibility fields.
No Captain default enablement is introduced by this slice.

goal: Add high-impact grip receipt scaffolding for runtime-deploy-check, runtime-deploy, service-restart, and later pr-merge without enabling blind execution.

metadata.claim_mode_note: Task claim mode describes implementation repository access; resulting grip effects are documented separately.
metadata.non_goal: Does not enable Captain defaults or blind privileged execution.
metadata.verification_note: Grabowski PR #92 merged; CI validate 3.10/3.12 passed; local python3 -m pytest and make validate passed before merge.
metadata.outcome: Added metadata-only reference receipt foundation with reference_sha256, target_sha256, receipt_sha256, replay/expiry metadata, risk, irreversibility, recovery path and external-agent contract fields.

validated_acceptance.privileged-receipt-risk: Receipt profiles include scope, risk_level, irreversibility and recovery_path for runtime-deploy-check, runtime-deploy, service-restart and pr-merge.
validated_acceptance.deploy-check-readonly: runtime-deploy-check profile is read_only=true, risk_level=low and covered by tests/test_reference_receipts.py.
validated_acceptance.no-default-captain: Receipt builder sets may_execute=false and captain_default_enabled=false; no runtime grip, MCP tool or Captain default is enabled.

title: Add privileged grip receipt foundation
